title: I Lead from Abundance, Not Lack
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the old habit of leading from scarcity or fear, and allowing the calm generosity of an abundant leader
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 81 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names leading from lack: holding back, minimising, moving from fear. The allow names the calm, generous quality of a leader whose decisions come from a full place.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 81 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use before a decision, conversation, or situation where you want to lead from a place of plenty rather than from caution or fear.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 81 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 81: see yourself as an abundant leader. The statement shifts the quality of leadership from scarcity-driven to abundance-driven.
I am ready to release every pattern of leading from lack, fear, or scarcity. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the calm, generous quality of a leader who decides and gives from a full place. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 81 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
